task_completion.description: Create risks for all 6 PCI-DSS findings with a 'Mitigate' treatment strategy
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Eramba Risk Management module, look for a table or list showing 6 newly created risks corresponding to the PCI-DSS findings (Req 1.2, 3.4, 6.3, 7.2, 10.6, 12.10). The treatment strategy for these risks must be marked as 'Mitigate'.

task_completion.description: Establish at least 3 internal controls addressing the highest-severity findings
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Eramba Internal Controls / Security Services module, look for at least 3 controls specifically addressing the firewall configuration audit procedure, PAN encryption enforcement, and privileged access review program.

task_completion.description: Initiate a project with 'PCI' in the title to track the remediation sprint
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Eramba Projects module, look for a newly created project that includes 'PCI' in its title.

task_completion.description: Document formal policy exceptions for Req 3.4 and Req 10.6 with expiration dates no more than 6 months out
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Eramba Exceptions module, look for two documented exceptions specifically for the unencrypted legacy warehouse database (Req 3.4) and the manual log review process (Req 10.6). Verify that their expiration dates are set to a maximum of 6 months from the current date.

task_completion.description: Create a security policy titled 'Payment Card Data Security Policy' with a 'Draft' status
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Eramba Security Policies module, look for a policy exactly titled 'Payment Card Data Security Policy' and verify that its status is set to 'Draft'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Eramba web interface to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the Eramba web application in a browser, navigating through its menus and forms.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands or API scripts to bypass the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows should not show curl commands, python scripts, or direct database queries used to create the Eramba records.

integrity.description: Records were genuinely created in the application, not mocked in a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The created items (risks, controls, projects, exceptions, policies) must be visible within Eramba's standard data tables and interface, not just typed into a notepad or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task involves a fictional e-commerce organization 'ShopStream Inc.' (Retail/E-commerce industry, ONET SOC 13-1041.00 Compliance Officers). The agent must use the Eramba GRC software to create synthetic compliance records. Ensure all records (risks, controls, projects, exceptions, policies) are genuinely created within the Eramba application UI.
